title: Windy but worth it
description: GOLF NEWS - The weekly golf competitions at...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GOLF NEWS - The weekly golf competitions at Graaff-Reinet Golf Club last weekend were played in challenging windy conditions but were enjoyed by every golfer as always.","html":"GOLF NEWS - The weekly golf competitions at Graaff-Reinet Golf Club last weekend were played in challenging windy conditions but were enjoyed by every golfer as always."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Results:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"IPS","html":"IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["1st: Jacques Wagener 40","2nd: Rob Hobson 40","3rd: Niek Steyn 35"],"ordered":false},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Two Clubs Bets Henning and Rob Hobson."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday IPS","html":"Saturday IPS"},{"type":"list","items":["1st: Vlam Pretorius 39","2nd: Frikkie Coetzee 33","3rd: Derek Light 31"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
